source.title: How to Import Resources into Sage
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How to Import Resources into Sage.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Importing resources into Starbased is essential for fueling your first fleet
Quick Steps:
Go to Your Faction’s Central Space Station
Open Starbased, select your profile and navigate to your Faction’s Central Space Station (ONI, USTUR or MUD CSS)
Open the Local Inventory
At the CSS, click on “Local Inventory”. This is where you manage resources needed for fueling fleets and supporting operations.
Select Resources & Quantity
Choose which resources (e.g., Fuel, Food, Ammo, Toolkits, or crafting materials) you wish to import and specify the quantity.
Click “Import from Wallet”
This will pull the selected resources from your connected wallet into your Local Inventory inside Starbased.
Approve the Transaction
Review and confirm the transaction in your wallet to complete the import
